case_title: PATRICIA I. RIVERA VS. BETH RIFKIN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, PATRICIA I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIFKIN, BETH $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,060.00, COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT VIOLATED CIVIL CODE SEC. 1950.5 BY NOT PROVIDING AN ITEMIZED LIST OF DAMAGES WITHIN 21 DAYS OF MOVE OUT. COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT WAS NOT IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-23-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RIFKIN, BETH
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY RIVERA, PATRICIA I. RIFKIN, BETH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY RIVERA, PATRICIA I. AS TO DEFENDANT RIFKIN, BETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, PATRICIA I. AS TO DEFENDANT RIFKIN, BETH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
